What We Do

Every environmental headache, one call away

From the bin outside your gate to the air conditioner above your desk — we cover the full range of waste, water and facility care services Juba homes and businesses need.

01
♻

Waste Management & Garbage Collection

Scheduled household and commercial collection, transport and safe disposal — bins supplied and serviced.

02
💧

Water & Sewage Treatment

Wastewater collection, treatment and disposal systems maintained for homes, estates and offices.

03
⚛

Sanitation Management

Toilet and septic facility servicing, disinfection and sanitation supplies for institutions and businesses.

04
♻

Plastic Waste Disposal & Removal

Collection, sorting and responsible removal of plastic waste from compounds, streets and job sites.

05
🔥

Oil Fields Waste Management

Specialised industrial waste handling and clean-up for oil field sites and contaminated land.

06
✨

Household & Hospitality Deep Cleaning

Thorough deep cleans for homes, hotels and apartments — move-in, move-out and routine care.

07
🐞

Pest Control Services

Safe, professional fumigation and pest treatment for residential and commercial premises.

08
❄

HVAC & AC Maintenance, Installation

Servicing, repair and new installation of air conditioning units and HVAC systems.

On-site treatment, Juba
Who We Are

Your one-stop partner for environmental and facility care

Based in Juba, G-Clear Solutions Ltd brings together trained crews, proper protective equipment and reliable scheduling to handle the work that keeps homes, offices, hotels and industrial sites clean, safe and compliant — from the bin at your gate to the systems behind your walls.

1

Trained, equipped crews

Our field teams work in proper protective gear, with the right tools for each job — from chemical sprays to sewage equipment.

2

Reliable scheduling

Routine collection, cleaning and maintenance visits you can plan around — no missed pickups, no guesswork.

3

Community-minded

We partner with schools and environmental groups on city-wide clean-up initiatives around Juba.

How We Work

From first call to clean handover

A simple route from request to result — the same way our crews route through the city, every day.

You reach out

Call, message or fill the form with what you need — collection, cleaning, repair or installation.

We assess the site

Our team reviews the scope, whether it's a single bin, a sewage line, or a full HVAC install.

Crew is dispatched

Trained, protected and properly equipped staff carry out the job on schedule.

Clean handover

We confirm the work is done right, and set up the next routine visit if needed.

In The Field

Our crews at work around Juba

Community & Environment

"I am protecting the Nile." We work with schools and environmental groups across Juba on clean-up drives that keep our rivers, roads and neighbourhoods free of waste.
